news.t: Investors bet on Nvidia share recovery with buying of leveraged ETFs
Top 2024 ETFs tied to one stock: Nvidia
REX Shares Partners with Tuttle Capital Management to Launch T-REX Single-Stock ETFs

overview.description: The T-Rex 2X Long NVIDIA Daily Target ETF (NVDX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of NVIDIA Corporation stock, less fees, and expenses. NVDX was launched on Oct 18, 2023 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.

data.title: Investors bet on Nvidia share recovery with buying of leveraged ETFs
data.text: Short-term traders are proving eager to bet on a rapid recovery in Nvidia , pouring money into the three largest leveraged exchange-traded funds which are linked to gains in the share price of the AI ...

data.title: Top 2024 ETFs tied to one stock: Nvidia
data.text: Nvidia's hot streak has been a boon for investors who own the common stock, but it's supercharging a handful of ETFs that are betting double on the chipmaker's moves.

data.title: Matt Tuttle on Getting NVDA Swaps for NVDX
data.text: Dealers are chock-full of Nvidia (NVDA), Matt Tuttle tells Oliver Renick in a conversation about the swaps-driven market structure behind NVDX. Tom White joins to demonstrates an example trade using N...

data.title: NVDA, FEPI: Popularity of Single Stock ETFs
data.text: REX shares Nvidia 2X Long ETF (NVDX) is up almost 60% this month. Scott Acheychek discusses the long and short of single stock ETFs.

data.title: REX Shares Partners with Tuttle Capital Management to Launch T-REX Single-Stock ETFs
data.text: MIAMI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--T-REX Single-Stock ETFs today debut on the Nasdaq and CBOE, offering targeted 200% and -200% exposure to two of the most widely-traded stocks on the market: Tesla and NVIDIA. B...
